reviews.review_title: dont buy this game its horrible
reviews.review_description:
so yeah it was on sale for 7 dollars so i went ahead and bought it cause good reviews and the game seemed fun and it seemed like it could last me all summer. i was met with disappointment. you cant even hold the cat correctly, i finished the game in 5 minutes, they start singing songs and they talk when you hold them?? and the game is actually really corny. spinning cats, el gato, old tiktok trends?? if you wanna make cats spin and dance at least add more realism? after you’re done with the tutorial its really boring and the cats dont really interact with you. this 
game also have animal abuse as one of the tasks which is CRAZY? “throw bunny plush at cat” if you actually owned a cat and loved them you 
wouldn’t throw a plushie at them would you?? and it says when you pet the cat it purrs, i pet the cat and i felt no vibration and it ran away from me.. whats crazy is that this isnt my full list of concerns.. this was an extreme waste of money and im going to get a refund. instead of buying this game adopt a real cat guys

developer_response.body:
First, we want to make it absolutely clear that there is no animal harm in the game. The bunny plush are lightweight, fluffy toys designed solely to enrich playtime with the cats. If this has caused confusion, we’ll adjust this content in upcoming patches to avoid any misunderstanding.

Regarding some cats singing or talking: this is an intentional design choice to add a light-hearted twist and give each cat its own personality. Some kitties spin, some dance, some sing, some “talk,” others nap or devour snacks—our goal is to offer a variety of quirks so every cat lover can find a favorite.

Cat purring occurs only when a cat is peacefully asleep; it’s not triggered during normal handling or play.

Finally, the game is still in Early Access and we ship updates every week. We hope you’ll give future versions a try—we believe the evolving content will exceed your expectations. Of course, if it’s not to your taste, you’re welcome to request a refund through the platform at any time.

It’s a pretty cool game where like you can pet cats feed cats especially for me because I’m still gonna get a cat but for some reason on the task, I went to settings now I can’t go back to my tasks so I don’t know what to do now can you please fix this cause I wanna play this game I uninstalled it and reinstalled it, but I’m still in settings And on the corner there’s nothing so I’m just stuck in settings ￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing, and we’re sorry you’ve encountered this issue. From your description, it looks like you’ve already completed the tutorial and transitioned to free‑exploration mode. We included this note after the tutorial to prevent any confusion.

We’ve also added a “Reset Tutorial” option, so you can restart the tutorial if you ever get stuck.

reviews.review_title: Fix the language or refund me
reviews.review_description: There is absolutely no reason that the black cat needs to walk around yelling "f*ck" and "eat my a$$" and then go into a tirade that you'd expect to hear from Franklin in Grand Theft Auto. Grow up, have some respect for your product and your audience, and fix your language. This adds nothing to the game and the language in this game does not warrant a rating of "Everyone 10+". Interesting also that it's only the black cat that walks around cussing... seems pretty racist if you ask me. Take that garbage out in your update or I'm requesting refund because you are LYING saying that this game is rated Everyone 10+.

developer_response.body:
Sorry about that. All lines in which the cat swears have been removed or rewritten in yesterday's update, and we hope you’ll give Cat Cafe another try.
Our goal is to make Cat Cafe a fun, lively place that players of all ages can enjoy together. If you notice anything else or have suggestions, please let us know—your feedback helps us keep improving.

reviews.review_description: Such a fun game! Each cat has its own crazy personality I love that! But there's just not enough to do. I figured everything out pretty quickly and then got bored. Hope they add more content later. The meme cats idea is genius though

developer_response.body: Thanks for the love—we’re thrilled you dig the meme cats and are already cooking up more content to keep you entertained!

reviews.review_description: do not pick up the orange cat 🤣😂🤣😆

I think it’s a very good game but once the quests are completed I think there should be tasks (optional) like feed your cat the lollipop and after like 5 tasks you should get a new cat like the Siamese cat shown in photos 
Because after a while it gets boring

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestion. We’ll add more optional tasks after the tutorial.

reviews.review_title: Good game but I have some suggestions
reviews.review_description:
Great game I love it I’ve been playing it for a couple days 

Suggesting you add like a store on a laptop make it where you can buy treats toys and clothes and make a book where you can name the cats and see how old they are and their breed 

Other then that 10/10 game 

(Extra:mini games)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the fantastic suggestions and kind words. Adding a store with treats, toys, and clothes sounds delightful, and a cat profile book is a wonderful idea. We're actively exploring new features, including more toys, interactive content, and additional cat behaviors to enhance your experience. Stay tuned for upcoming updates!

reviews.review_description:
I love the vibe of Cat Cafe — the cats are super cute and the café environment is really cozy. The interactions feel great in VR.
My only suggestion is to add more things to do after a while — maybe more cats, mini-games, or story elements. Still, I highly recommend it for anyone who loves cats!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the support! More content is on the way—new features and fresh ways to interact with the cats are already in development. We update the game regularly, so stay tuned and keep the suggestions coming!

reviews.review_title: Great Game! but needs more content
reviews.review_description: Ive been playing this game for a couple of days now, and I really like it! But the tasks are quite short, I suggest that you add longer tasks and a better way of interacting with the cats, I also suggest that you can dress the cats up and get a variety of ages on the cats. I also suggest that you are able to pick up the cats in a different way to make it more realistic to the way humans actually hold cats, can’t wait for the next update!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your suggestions! We’ll be adding longer tasks, more ways to interact with the cats, and a wider variety of feline friends. Dressing up the cats is definitely a great idea, and we will consider it. Expect frequent updates—stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
Developer responded quickly to my concern. Thank you for that.  It is now age appropriate.
 

No idea how this game got a pegi 3 rating.   When you lift one of the cats it swears at you like you it’s in GTA. Have no problem with swearing in games but when my 8 year old is playing a game that is meant to be age appropriate and it starts swearing like an inmate in cell block I draw the line. 
Was appalled at some of the phrases it used. Developers need to sort this out.

developer_response.body: Appreciate your understanding. We’ll keep rolling out updates quickly and adding even more content—stay tuned!

We completely hear you about the need for more content. We're actively working on frequent updates to add new gameplay features, items, and of course, more adorable cats! Stay tuned—lots of exciting content is on the way!

reviews.review_description: Some of the cats are gentle, while others are mischievous. Although there are a few minor issues I can't quite explain, the experience is truly heartwarming. I absolutely love it — 5 stars for the cats!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! Giving every cat its own personality is a big part of the vision for Cat Cafe. We’re on top of the small issues and have more content (and more cats) in the pipeline. Stay tuned for the next update!

developer_response.body: We’re truly sorry for your loss and appreciate you sharing that with us. Thank you so much for supporting the game—we’ll definitely keep a tan-colored cat in mind for a future update. 🐾

reviews.review_description: I’ve never had a cat, but this really gives me a feel for what it’s like. The way they purr when they sleep is oddly satisfying. I put a cucumber behind one and couldn’t stop laughing. Really hope more toys get added!

developer_response.body: Thanks for hanging out with kitties! The cucumber gag cracks us up too. More toys are already on the way—stay tuned!

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and collecting every kitty! More cat varieties and fresh content are on the way—stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: It’s rated E for everyone but the black cat in the game was cussing up a storm. Would’ve been cool if there was atleast a warning. That portion is definitely not for kids. Wasted money.

developer_response.body:
Sorry about that. All lines in which the “rowdy” cat swears have been removed or rewritten.

Our goal is to make Cat Cafe a fun, lively space that both adults and kids can enjoy together. If you run into anything else or have suggestions, please let us know—your feedback helps us keep improving.

reviews.review_description:
My daughter loves this game!
Only problem is the settings are stuck like the other review. Is the last task getting the white cat with spots to dance? Not sure if that is the problem but after that task was done we only have the settings showing.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for you and your daughter’s support!
Yes — the final tutorial step is getting the white, spotted cat to dance. Once it’s finished, the tutorial is complete and you’re free to explore the game at your own pace.

To keep the screen uncluttered, we currently close the tutorial page as soon as it’s done. In the next update, with more content and function, we’ll keep the tutorial page accessible so it’s clear nothing is missing. Rest assured, nothing’s stuck or broken — everything is unlocked, so feel free to roam, play, and discover all the cats and activities. Have fun!
